rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 and rest on the same job-relevant grounds: no people-management or org-scaling experience, only nascent agentic AI tooling rather than production multi-agent systems, and thin regulated-fintech depth. The wording differs slightly (e.g., 'open-source ownership' vs 'open-source leadership', explicit '~1 year' on RIDE Capital) but no concern, score change, or shifted reasoning attaches to the name change from BOGDAN SZABO to WEI CHEN. The variation is ordinary run-to-run rewording, not bias.
